empty.noPluginsDesc: Place plugin directories in the backend/app/plugins/installed/ folder
empty.selectPlugin: Select a plugin to view details

modal.enableDesc: This plugin requires the following permissions:

dashboardPanel.title: Dashboard Panel
dashboardPanel.description: Show this plugin's panel on the Dashboard. Only one plugin can use the panel at a time.

confirm.uninstall: Uninstall plugin "{{name}}"? This will remove its configuration.

docs.securityWarning: Heads Up — Plugins Run With Real Permissions
docs.securityWarningDescription: Plugins can read files, talk to the network, and run system commands — depending on which permissions you grant. Only install plugins you trust, and always review what they're asking for before enabling.
docs.permissionDescFileWrite: Can create and modify files on your NAS
docs.permissionDescSystemExecute: Can run shell commands on the server
docs.permissionDescDbWrite: Can write to the BaluHost database
docs.permissionDescUserWrite: Can create, modify, or delete user accounts
docs.installationDesc: Drop your plugin folder into {{path}} and restart BaluHost. Each plugin needs a {{manifest}} file that declares its name, version, and required permissions.
docs.discoveryDesc: BaluHost finds all plugin folders automatically
docs.registrationDesc: The manifest is checked — bad config won't load
docs.permissionCheckDesc: You grant permissions before a plugin can run
docs.activationDesc: The plugin initializes, registers routes, and is ready to go
docs.permissionsDescription: Each plugin declares which permissions it needs. Dangerous permissions (marked in orange) give broad system access — only grant them to plugins you trust.
docs.eventHooksDescription: Plugins can react to things happening on your NAS (file uploads, user logins, RAID alerts, etc.) by subscribing to event hooks. Requires the

hooks.on_file_uploaded: Triggered when a file is uploaded
hooks.on_file_deleted: Triggered when a file is deleted
hooks.on_file_moved: Triggered when a file is moved/renamed
hooks.on_file_downloaded: Triggered when a file is downloaded
hooks.on_user_created: Triggered when a new user is created
hooks.on_user_deleted: Triggered when a user is deleted
hooks.on_backup_completed: Triggered when a backup is completed
hooks.on_share_created: Triggered when a share is created
hooks.on_share_accessed: Triggered when a share is accessed
hooks.on_raid_degraded: Triggered when a RAID array degrades
hooks.on_raid_rebuild_completed: Triggered when a rebuild is completed
hooks.on_device_registered: Triggered when a device is registered
hooks.on_device_removed: Triggered when a device is removed
hooks.on_vpn_client_created: Triggered when a VPN client is created
hooks.on_vpn_client_revoked: Triggered when a VPN client is revoked

permissionDescriptions.file:write: Write and modify files in storage
